user.title: SVV Traffic – new area
user.description: Set up an area to monitor. You can add more areas later.

data.area_type: Area type (county, road number or radius)
data.data_types: Which data do you want to fetch?
data.use_demo: Demo mode (test data, no login required)

area.title: Area details
area.description: Specify what the area should cover.

data.location: Pick a point and radius on the map

datex.title: DATEX login (optional)
datex.description: Road messages, webcams, travel time and weather require DATEX access from the Norwegian Public Roads Administration. Leave the fields empty to skip – you can add them later under Settings.

roads.title: Select roads
roads.description: These roads currently have road messages in {county} (count in parentheses). Choose which ones to monitor. Leave empty to include all roads in the county.

error.auth: Login was rejected. Check the username, password and that your IP address is registered with NPRA.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to DATEX. Please try again later.

data.roads: Roads (empty = all roads in the county)
